_comment: CLAMR cell-based AMR shallow water — 4 MPI ranks throughout.
Checkpoint: -c 100 → backup<NNNNN>.crx every 100 cycles, into ./checkpoint_output/ subdir.
First checkpoint fires at ncycle=100 (~6.6s in).
Recovery:    -R <file> loads the checkpoint; restore_crux_data_bootstrap() rebuilds AMR state.
small-low rationale: kill at 65s lands at ~ncycle=985, after ~9 checkpoints.
Restart loads latest backup and redoes ~15% of remaining cycles.

scenarios.name: small-nofail
scenarios._purpose: Golden: upstream-validated -n 256 -t 5000 = ~10s actual runtime (mass-conservation rollback fires with bigger mesh). Workload too small for 120s target; accept short runtime for now.

scenarios.name: small-low
scenarios._purpose: 1 failure injected at 5s — after first checkpoint at cycle 500 (~1s in). Restart loads checkpoint and redoes the remaining cycles.
